basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Hyderabad is recruiting 1 Post Doctoral Fellow with Ph.D. qualification. Last date: 8 July 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the eligibility conditions as mentioned.
qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering or Allied Areas

selection_process: The PI will evaluate and shortlist applications. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview. Preference will be given to candidates with prior relevant experience. Joining will be immediate after selection. The position will remain open if no suitable candidate is found.
how_to_apply: Upload: Latest CV (with 2 referees), Scanned degree certificates & transcripts, Ph.D. Thesis abstract with 2 best publications
Send email with CV to the PI with subject: TSL ANRF Postdoc
Fill the Google Form (link mentioned in official advertisement).
Send your CV via email to Dr. Ankush Kumar Jaiswal at [email protected] with subject TSL ANRF Postdoc.
Ensure all documents are uploaded properly before the deadline.
important_instructions: This is a time-bound project appointment (11 months, extendable). Only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the online interview. The selection committee’s decision is final. Candidates with prior relevant experience will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Hyderabad is recruiting 1 Post Doctoral Fellow with Ph.D. qualification. Last date: 8 July 2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_hyderabad: Developing solutions to reduce human heat strain and extending safe exposure in extreme heat

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the eligibility conditions as mentioned.

rows.details: Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering or Allied Areas

• Strong expertise in designing thermal systems and conducting experiments • Proficiency in numerical simulation using ANSYS® Fluent • Good understanding of heat transfer, thermodynamics, fluid dynamics, and phase change phenomena • Prior experience or interest in human thermal comfort, heat stress analysis, and human thermal modelling

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Application Process
content_sections.text: Eligible applicants should: Fill out the Google Form Upload: Latest CV (with 2 referees), Scanned degree certificates & transcripts, Ph.D. Thesis abstract with 2 best publications Send email with CV to the PI with subject: TSL ANRF Postdoc

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The PI will evaluate and shortlist applications. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview. Preference will be given to candidates with prior relevant experience. Joining will be immediate after selection. The position will remain open if no suitable candidate is found.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: This is a time-bound project appointment (11 months, extendable). Only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the online interview. The selection committee’s decision is final. Candidates with prior relevant experience will be preferred.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is 8th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the fellowship amount for Post Doctoral Fellow at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: The fellowship is Rs. 58,000 per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIT Hyderabad ANRF Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering or Allied Areas. Strong expertise in thermal systems and ANSYS Fluent is highly desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Initial duration is 11 months, which can be extended based on performance.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the Google Form and email your CV to the PI with subject TSL ANRF Postdoc.

faq.question: Q6. What skills are required for IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow in Heat Strain Project?
faq.answer: Expertise in thermal systems design, ANSYS Fluent simulations, heat transfer, thermodynamics, fluid dynamics, and preferably human thermal modelling.

faq.question: Q7. Who is the Principal Investigator for IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow project?
faq.answer: Dr. Ankush Kumar Jaiswal, Assistant Professor, Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Shortlisting by PI followed by online interview. Preference to candidates with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is prior experience mandatory for IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellow?
faq.answer: Ph.D. is mandatory. Prior experience in thermal systems, experiments, or human heat stress analysis is highly desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Can the IIT Hyderabad Post Doctoral Fellowship be extended?
faq.answer: Yes, the position can be extended based on performance beyond the initial 11 months.
